title: Luffy Runs Out of Time — Part 2
description: Luffy’s Gear Fourth backlash leaves him vulnerable while the Birdcage keeps closing.
scene: On pages 7–11, Luffy, Doflamingo, King Riku, Dressrosa Citizens, Trafalgar Law move through the final crisis of Dressrosa as the Birdcage and Doflamingo’s rule reach their breaking point.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If I just sit back, gear fourth just might hit its time limit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Gomu Gomu No

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Among people

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Double

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: It's fair to say you have a good grasp on your abilities, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: At what burden? How many more seconds can you last? There is bound to be a risk to all this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Fufu...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: CUL: Verin!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: off- white thread!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: The threads are coming out of the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Listen carefully. Beyond the powers of a little baby,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There is another. Another world of power known as "awaken- ing"!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: WaHA! The buildings have become threads!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: In rare occasions, one's abilities "awaken" and begin to affect, not just their own body, but their surroundings!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING'S Becoming String!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: It's almost like he isn't a Paramecia user!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Twenty minutes later...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: We're gonna get cut to pieces! Run!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Uugh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Grand- Ma!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: GRANDMA! Get up!

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: You're gonna get cut by those threads!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: HAA-... I can't. I can't run anymore.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Just leave me! You go on ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: No, no! There's no way I could do that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: There's no hope for me either way!

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: Running all the way to the central districts... isn't happening!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Someone! Give us a hand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: There are still patients inside the hospital!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: We can't possibly carry them all! Please! Someone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: My child!! Has anyone seen my child!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: He's wearing a shirt with a bear on it! He's just 5 years old! Anyone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: We're all gonna die anyway...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Why put up a fight...

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: No matter how much we run and run...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: In the end, we're just gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Get slaughtered by Dofla- Mingo.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Everyone ...Listen to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: I am the former King of Dress- Rosa...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Riku told the III!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: K... King Riku!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: I shall now attempt to explain to you what is currently happening in this country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: As a result of the "game" begun by the current King, DoFlamingo, this country is now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: surrounded by a giant "bird cage."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Furthermore, that cage has begun contracting and is carving up our very city.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: KING RIKU...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: i am sure it has been all but impossible...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: to respond adequately to this sudden turn of events...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: At present, most of you are doing your level best just to stay alive.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: yet, make no mistake; this is all no dream!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: Someone who is

summary: This part focuses on luffy runs out of time, keeping the final battle centered on Luffy, Law, Doflamingo, and the people trapped inside the Birdcage.
